flashcards.front: What are the two types of accounts in Ethereum?
flashcards.back: Externally Owned Accounts (EOAs) and Contract Accounts (CAs)

flashcards.front: What controls an Externally Owned Account (EOA)?
flashcards.back: A private key owned by a human user

flashcards.front: What is the main purpose of a Contract Account?
flashcards.back: To execute smart contract code when triggered by transactions

flashcards.front: What are the four components of an Ethereum account?
flashcards.back: Nonce, balance, storage hash, and code hash

flashcards.front: Can a Contract Account initiate transactions?
flashcards.back: No, Contract Accounts can only react to transactions sent to them
